title: Customers Without Orders (NULL Trap)
description: Find customers who have not placed any orders. Orders table may contain NULL customer_ids.
sql_solution: SELECT id FROM customers c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = c.id);
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

result = (
    customers.join(orders, customers.id == orders.customer_id, "left_anti")
    .select(customers.id.alias("id"))
)
